urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Shabbir Ka Tum Sadka Ho, Ab Khaime Mai Beta, Tum Laut KarNa Aana
english translation text: YOU HAVE BEEN SACRIFICED FOR SHABBIR (A.S), NOW O MY SONS, DO NOT RETURN TO THE TENTS

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Hai Maa Ko Yaqeen, Tum Maa Ki Baat Rakhoge,
english translation text: YOUR MOTHER HAS CONFIDENCE THAT YOU WOULD LISTEN TO HER

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Yaad Rahe, Khaimo Mai Hai Pyaase Bache,
english translation text: REMEMBER THAT THERE ARE THIRSTY CHILDREN IN THE TENTS

urdu transliteration text: Dariya Pe Agar Jaana Ho, Seh Roz Ke Pyaaso, Tum Pyaas Na Bujhaana
english translation text: IF YOU REACH THE RIVER, Oh MY THIRSTY CHILDREN, DO NOT QUENCH YOUR THIRST

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Har Haal Pe Tum Par, Laazim Hai Shukr Khuda Ka,
english translation text: YOU ARE OBLIGATED TO THANK GOD AT EVERY SITUATION

urdu transliteration text: Aye Shehzaadon, Hai Sabr Tumhaara Virsaa,
english translation text: O MY PRINCES’, PATIENCE IS YOUR INHERITTANCE

urdu transliteration text: Farzand Ho Tum Zainab Ke, Shikwa Nahi Karna, Jab Zakhm Koi Khaana
english translation text: YOU ARE THE BOYS OF ZAINAB (A.S), DO NOT COMPLAIN WHEN YOU ARE INFLICTED WITH ANY INJURY

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Kab Ham Pe Sitam, Karne Ke Liye Aaye Hai,
english translation text: WHEN HAVE THEY COME TO INFLICT PAIN ON US?

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Badro-Ohad Ke, Badle Ke Liye Aaye Hai
english translation text: THEY HAVE ACTUALLY COME TO AVENGE THE BATTLES OF BADR AND UHuD

urdu transliteration text: Laazim Hai Rajaz Se Pehle, Maidaan Mai Tum Par, Madhe-Ali Sunaana
english translation text: BEFORE YOU ENTER THE BATTLEFIELD, YOU ARE OBLIGATED TO SING THE PRAISES OF ALI (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Jab Saans Tumhaari, Bacho Ho Utarne Waali,
english translation text: WHEN YOU ARE ABOUT TO BREATHE YOUR LAST, O MY SONS…

urdu transliteration text: Uss Waqt Sirhaane, Aayegi Maadar Meri,
english translation text: AT THAT TIME, MY MOTHER (BIBI FATIMA) WILL BE PRESENT BESIDES YOU

urdu transliteration text: Dil Ki Yeh Meri Khwaahish Hai, Uss Dam Meri Maa Se, Zakhmon Ko Tum Chhupaana
english translation text: it IS MY EARNEST REQUEST FOR YOU TO PLEASE HIDE YOUR INJURIES FROM HER AT THAT TIME

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Qaatil Pe Karam, Nana Ki Tarha Kardena,
english translation text: HAVE MERCY ON YOUR KILLER, THE WAY YOUR GRANDFATHER DID

urdu transliteration text: Yun Laaj Mere, Bhai Ke Naam Ki Rakhna,
english translation text: THIS WAY, YOU WOULD KEEP THE RESPECT OF MY BROTHER’S NAME

urdu transliteration text: Jo Waasta De Bhai Ka, Maidaan Pe Uss Par, Tum Tegh Na Chalaana
english translation text: ANYONE ON THE BATTLEFIELD, WHO PLEADS USING MY BROTHER’S NAME, DO NOT ATTACK HIM

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Jab Laashe Uthaakar, Khaime Mai Laaye Sarwar,
english translation text: WHEN SARWAR (IMAM HUSSAIN) BROUGHT THE CORPSES OF THE BOYS TO THE TENT

urdu transliteration text: Zainab Yeh Boli, Askhon Ko Apne Chhupaakar,
english translation text: ZAINAB (A.S) SAID, HIDING HER TEARS…

urdu transliteration text: Mai Bhi Na Tumhe Rowungi, Aur Mere Liye Bhi, Aansu Na Tum Bahaana
english translation text: “I WILL NOT CRY FOR YOU…AND YOU DO NOT SHED TEARS FOR ME TOO”

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Taazeem Ki Khaatir, Kyun Uthte Nahi Ab Beta,
english translation text: WHY HAVEN’T YOU STOOD UP OUT OF RESPECT, Oh MY SONS?

urdu transliteration text: Dekho Toh Sirhaane, Aaye Hai Mere Bhayya,
english translation text: LOOK MY BROTHER HAS COME BESIDES YOU

urdu transliteration text: Jaago Mere Shehzaado, Kya Bhoolgaye Ho, Qadmo Pe Sar Jhukaana
english translation text: WAKE UP, O MY PRINCES’, HAVE YOU FORGOTTEN TO BOW YOUR HEADS ON HIS FEET?

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text: Shabaash Mere, Bacho Hun Mai Tumse Raazi,
english translation text: “BRAVO MY SONS! YOUR MOTHER IS PLEASED WITH YOU”

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Kehke Takallum, Khamosh Huwi Shahzaadi,
SAYING THIS, PRINCESS
(ZAINAB A.S) BECAME SILENT…
Nezo Pe Safar Karke, Hamraah Hamaare, Tumko Hai Shaam Jaana
english translation text: “WITH YOUR HEADS ON SPEARS, YOU WILL BE ACCOMPANYING US ALL THE WAY TO SHAAM”

urdu transliteration text: Aye aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: OH AUN AND MUHAMMAD
